Pharmaceutical and Biotech Researchers Accelerate drug development and innovation with a data-driven R&D strategy. Our platform helps you aggregate imaging data, streamline workflows, collaborate efficiently and develop analysis-ready datasets for research and AI development. View Solution Clinical Researchers More than just a data repository, Flywheel is a scalable medical image management system and research workflow solution. We help you securely access, process, analyze and collaborate on your data for research and AI development. View Solution What is Flywheel? Maybe you’ve heard that 80% of a data scientist’s time is spent finding, curating and organizing data. We’re changing that. Flywheel is the revolutionary imaging data management platform that lets you realize optimum value out of your imaging data. Scalable by design, Flywheel gives you tools to securely discover, manage, curate and compute large amounts of data, either within your organization or with collaborators across the world. What is Flywheel? Maybe you’ve heard that 80% of a data scientist’s time is spent finding, curating and organizing data. We’re changing that. conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: Hi, my name is Alex and I'm reaching out from DeepData AI. We're a data processing solution that helps medical imaging companies like yours streamline their workflows and unlock innovation. I came across Flywheel and was impressed with the work you're doing in medical image analysis. Can you tell me a bit about your current data management challenges?

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: Ah, yeah. We're doing okay, I suppose. We've got a lot on our plate right now, and to be honest, data management is just one of many things we're trying to tackle. What makes you think we need a new data processing solution?

conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: Well, from what I've researched, it seems like Flywheel is handling a large volume of medical imaging data, and our solution can help you process that data more efficiently. We've had success with similar companies in the past, and I think we could really help you accelerate your research and development.

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: I'm not sure that's a priority for us right now. We've got a lot of competing demands on our resources, and I'm not convinced that a new data processing solution is going to be the best use of our time and money. Plus, we're already invested in some other tools and platforms - how would your solution integrate with what we're already using?

conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: I completely understand your concerns about integration. Our solution is designed to be flexible and compatible with a wide range of tools and platforms. We've had success integrating with companies that use similar systems to yours, and I'd be happy to provide some case studies or references if that would be helpful. As for the cost, I think we could offer a competitive pricing structure that would fit within your budget.

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: I appreciate the offer, but like I said, this just isn't a priority for us right now. We're in the middle of a major project and we can't afford to take on anything new. Plus, I'm not sure our team has the bandwidth to implement a new solution even if we wanted to. And to be honest, I'm not convinced that your solution is significantly better than what we're already using or what our competitors are offering.

conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: I understand that you're busy, and I respect that. Can I at least schedule a follow-up call for a few months from now to check in and see if your priorities have shifted? Maybe we could also discuss a pilot project or a trial to demonstrate the value of our solution?

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: I appreciate the persistence, but I think it's best if we just focus on our current priorities. We've got a lot on our plate and I don't see this as something we'll be able to tackle in the near future. I think it's best if we just table this discussion for now and focus on our existing projects. Thanks for reaching out, but I think we'll have to pass on DeepData AI for the time being.

analysis.raw:
Score: 2
Outcome: Failure
Key_Objection: Timing
Feedback: The seller should have more aggressively addressed the buyer's concerns about timing and prioritization earlier in the conversation to potentially shift their perspective. Sentiment: Neutral
